title: Brittle
text:
## 3. The Burden

At Sāvatthī. “Mendicants, I will teach you what is brittle and what is not brittle. Listen … And what is brittle? What is not brittle? Form is brittle, but its cessation, settling, and ending is not brittle. Feeling … perception … choices … consciousness is brittle, but its cessation, settling, and ending is not brittle.”
